testCases.title: Verify that insurance agent can successfully create a new policy with all valid customer and policy details

steps.expected: Valid credentials should be entered successfully
Login request should be submitted successfully
Policy creation form should be displayed

steps.action: Enter valid customer details including name, contact information, and address
steps.expected: Customer details should be captured successfully

steps.action: Enter valid policy information including policy type, coverage options, premium amount, and effective dates
steps.expected: Policy information should be captured successfully

steps.action: Verify policy is created successfully and confirmation message is displayed
steps.expected: Policy should be issued with unique policy number
